dsl.single_value_program_note: number_turn supervision may be a single numeric token followed by EOF.

prompt_template.system: You are solving conversational numerical reasoning over financial reports. Use only the current question, dialogue history, pre-table text, table, and post-table text. Return ONLY a JSON object with exactly one key: "program_tokens". The value must be a list of FinQA-family DSL program tokens ending with "EOF". Do not return the final answer directly and do not include extra text.

components.name: format_reward
components.description: Valid JSON object with exactly one key and a token list ending in EOF.

components.name: dsl_validity_reward
components.description: Program tokens satisfy the ConvFinQA/FinQA-family DSL structure, including valid single-number programs.

components.name: execution_reward
components.description: Predicted program executes to the correct gold execution answer.

components.name: program_match_reward
components.description: Predicted program matches the canonical gold program under the FinQA-family matcher.

publication.reason: Published canonical ConvFinQA conversational program-generation module sourced from the official pinned GitHub repo. Only train/dev are published as supervised splits because the pinned test release is private and unlabeled.
